content.en:
The Styx Emperor is very strong, and he is proficient in soul secret arts, no matter how the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor resists, there is no way to stop the Styx Emperor from extracting his soul origin memory.

After a while, the Emperor of the River Styx successfully extracted the soul origin memory of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, and this part of the memory was derived from the soul origin and could not be changed or forged.

"Emperors, in order to prevent personal fraud, let's all come and explore this soul origin memory!"

Emperor Styx suggested.

"Good!"

Emperor Guangling agreed.

The other emperors also nodded their heads one by one, and their soul consciousness probed the soul origin memory of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor.

Soon, this memory was explored by the emperors.

"The Forbidden Void Realm is really not the !! refined by the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor"

Many emperors frowned.

I thought it was Shi Ying Dao Ancestor refining, and deliberately concealed it, but I didn't expect it to be not him.

A misunderstanding, let the Heavenly Emperor Palace's Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor potential be scrapped, I am afraid that there is no way to be promoted to the strongest Dao Ancestor, it will undoubtedly make the Heavenly Emperor Palace lose a top genius, or even a strong person in the future.

Of course, many emperors did not feel the slightest guilt.

For them, the life of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was not worth much.

But what made them angry was that the Heavenly Emperor Palace was tricked, and the person who secretly refined the Forbidden Void Realm must have taken the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor as the back, and it was estimated that it was planted for the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Now, the Heavenly Emperor Palace said that it had extracted the soul origin memory of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, and announced that the Forbidden Void Realm was not refined by the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, and I am afraid that no force would be willing to believe it.

They only believed what they had seen, and decided that the Forbidden Void Realm belonged to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

It can be said that the loss of the Heavenly Emperor Palace this time is not small.

A forbidden treasure fixed empty plate, a sevenfold heavenly dao ancestor who is expected to become a ninefold heavenly invincible dao ancestor in the future, and a big black cauldron.

"Damn, we must find out the person who refines the Forbidden Void Realm, and if you dare to play tricks on our Heavenly Emperor Palace, you must kill him!"

One emperor after another roared in the Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

And the stone eagle Dao Ancestor who was lying on the ground with a pale face wanted to cry even more without tears, he proved his innocence, but his potential was destroyed!

He didn't dare to resent the emperors, he could only resent the people who secretly cheated him.

......

Not long after, the Heavenly Emperor Palace announced that the Forbidden Void Realm was not refined by them, and the reward for refining the Forbidden Void Realm was very rich.

However, the words of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were not believed.

Terran.

Ye Tian learned of the declaration of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and had to sigh that the Heavenly Emperor Palace was miserable by Ouyang Jiu'er, and he had used up the forbidden treasures like the Dingkong Disk without succeeding in refining the Forbidden Void Realm, and the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor like the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor was estimated to have been extracted from the soul origin memory, and the whole person was almost useless.

Moreover, the soul has a big flaw, which means that there is a problem with the soul defense, and in the future, I am afraid that it will not be considered an invincible level at the level of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it is estimated that it will not be able to defeat the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and them.

Ye Tian was not worried that half of his authority in the Forbidden Void Realm was discovered by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Forbidden Void Realm was very hidden, and he did not need to enter from the original entrance, but could enter the Forbidden Void Realm from any place in the Mysterious Void Ancient Realm.

For example, the human race is currently in control of a small entrance, Ye Tian enters and exits the Forbidden Void Realm, how does the Heavenly Emperor Palace know?

Just like the small realm of Black Wind Mountain, you can casually return to the small realm from any place in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the invincible Dao Ancestors and even the half-step domain ancestors have no way to spy on the location of the small realm.

The Forbidden Void Realm is far less concealed than the Small Realm, but even if the Invincible Dao Ancestors and even the Half-Step Domain Ancestors can sense the location of the Forbidden Void Realm, they have no way to send people in, and they have no way to spy on the situation inside.

Because it now has a Lord!

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian took his wife Xiao Yue, sister Ye Yu, and a pair of children into the Forbidden Void Realm, and was about to start a long-term retreat and cultivation.

The Forbidden Void Realm is a void of its own, and the ratio of time to the outside world is 1000 to 1, but in the Forbidden Void Realm, it can also speed up 10,000 times the time, in that case, cultivating in the Forbidden Void Realm is equivalent to 10 million times the time passage of the outside world, what a terrifying time pass!

Therefore, if the Forbidden Void Realm cultivates under his command, the growth rate will be extremely fast.

The only pity is that this is a small forbidden void realm.

But if it weren't for the small forbidden void realm, the rules would be perfect, and the proportion of time with the outside world would be the same.

Therefore, there are pros and cons to this.

Before the real retreat, Ye Tian took out the forbidden spirit root liquid he had obtained.

"Yue'er, Xiaoyu, Xingchen, Xingyue, this is the forbidden spirit root liquid, you take it back to refine and cultivate! Your cultivation is a true ancestor, you can't refine too much at one time, after diluting a drop of the forbidden spirit root liquid ten thousand times, then slowly refining and cultivating, understand?"

Ye Tian reminded.

"The legendary forbidden spirit root!"

Ye Xingchen was very excited.

Immediately, he took the forbidden spirit root liquid: "Thank you, father!"

Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, and Ye Xingyue also took the forbidden spirit root liquid one by one and put it away.

Ye Tian didn't give too much forbidden spirit root liquid, after all, their cultivation was not very high, and it was useless to ask for too much.

If they ran out of the Forbidden Spirit Root Liquid, he would give them some petals of the Forbidden Spirit Root Flower to cultivate.

After the Forbidden Spirit Root Liquid was distributed, Ye Tian's family began to retreat and cultivate.

Retreat Chamber.

Ye Tian took out a forbidden spirit root flower petal, swallowed it in one gulp, and the terrifying energy swept through his body, and the refining began.

Under the refining of the Nine Extremes Dao Canon, Ye Tian's forbidden Dao power continued to absorb the energy of the forbidden spirit root flower petals, rapidly improving, and then refining the body and soul, and the overall cultivation continued to soar.

In the blink of an eye, 10,000 years have passed in the outside world.

For Ye Tian, they have spent an incomparably long time.

First of all, the human race, a large number of geniuses cultivated in the forbidden void realm, and one by one became the strongest true ancestors, but it is a pity that these human geniuses have limited potential, and there is no Dao-level natal talent assistance, so there is no way to impact the invincible true ancestor level, otherwise the human race may give birth to some invincible true ancestors!

After Ye Tian's understanding, the human race currently has seventy-two Supreme True Ancestors and thousands of top True Ancestors.

Moreover, the number of Dao Ancestors of the Human Race has also increased a lot, and it has reached hundreds, of which there are already six Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors and dozens of Second Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

These figures do not include the Nine Poles!

The Nine Extremes Legion was vigorously cultivated by Ye Tian, and the growth rate was even more amazing, giving birth to three invincible true ancestors, and those three invincible true ancestors were given Dao-level natal talents by Ye Tian, in the name of giving special treasures.

Moreover, those three invincible Dao Ancestors also made a natal oath not to be leaked, and to be loyal to Ye Tian, otherwise Ye Tian would not have spent a lot of money to cultivate them.

In addition, the number of True Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion has reached sixty thousand, all of them are powerful True Ancestors above the Elite True Ancestors, including thousands of Supreme True Ancestors.

And for this, Ye Tian spent countless resources.
